\tzpentry{ID5896}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5896 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$S(\rho) = -\text{Tr}[\rho \log_2 \rho]$$
